heading_content_part: This privacy policy applies to the following apps by keuwlsoft:Guitar Tuner(Version 1.60)The MICROPHONE permission (android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO) is used in the app.

decoder_heading: How We Use Data From The Microphone
ident_heading: We only use data from the micropho
heading_content_part: We only use data from the microphone within the app for the purpose of the app functionality.This app
also uses the internet (android.permission.INTERNET) permission so that we can serve ads and generate a little revenue.In order to deliver the ads, we use the

Google.   Please see their terms andprivacy policyfor information on any data they might collect or share.   Also seehttps://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sitesfor a good explanation of how Google uses information from Apps.          Only Non personalised ads are shown. AdMob will serve ads from any of the Google-certified ad networks.Whilst keuwlsoft does not directly collect or store any of your personal or non-personal information,

some anonymous analytical data (e.g. app usage, crash reports and ad effectiveness data) is available to us through AdMob and/or the Google Developer Console.In older versions of the app (Version 1.51 and below), personalised ads may have been used. You can see the privacy policy for for earlier app versionshere.
